title: coleus igniarioides
intro: Coleus igniarioides, also known as Coleus, is a tropical plant native to Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Coleus igniarioides include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Coleus igniarioides can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its extracts in capsule or topical form.
